hint: arXiv (cs.PL/cs.DC compiler & memory-allocator papers); LLVM, Cranelift, GCC, Zig, and Rust release notes + RFCs/changelogs; allocator literature (mimalloc, snmalloc, tcmalloc, jemalloc); reputable benchmark write-ups (Rust perf book, godbolt/Compiler Explorer studies, Zig devlog). Prefer primary sources from distinct organizations over secondary blogs that cite each other.
